next_steps: Set access.nodes[0].ip on inventory/manual/systems/keycloak-a.json from query output.
Configure nginx-waf to proxy keycloak.external_url to the CT upstream URL.
Declare realms under keycloak.realms[] (optional $hdc.include files under realms/) and run maintain.
Configure clients and identity providers in the Keycloak admin console (not managed by hdc v1).
